violations.text: Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment is to use sanitizing bay of 3-bay sink to sanitize dishes after running them through the dishwasher. Call to service was placed during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair prep units #1, #3, and #5. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

The floor in the back service area and walk-in cooler is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floors must be resurfaced so that surface is smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026
